creator: roger@gujord.com
text:
Package heartbeat fails to install on a fresh and clean FBSD installation.

[root@two ~]$ pkg_add -r heartbeat
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6.2-release/Latest/heartbeat.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6.2-release/All/pkg-config-0.21.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6.2-release/All/libiconv-1.9.2_2.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6.2-release/All/libxml2-2.6.26.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6.2-release/All/glib-1.2.10_12.tbz... Done.
Fetching ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/i386/packages-6.2-release/All/curl-7.15.5.tbz... Done.
./+INSTALL: Permission denied
pkg_add: install script returned error status

How-To-Repeat: pkg_add -r heartbeat
